---
title: "A Fully Differentiable Framework for Autonomous Driving Based on Model-Structured Neural Networks"
author:
  - "Sabrina Ciuffoletti"
  - "Gioele Defrancesco"
  - "Giovanni Scialla"
  - "Mattia Piazza"
  - "Sebastiano Taddei"
  - "Gastone Pietro Rosati Papini"
publication: "ICRA 2026 — Autonomous Driving Workshop (2026)"
type: poster
categories:
  - "Posters"
  - "Model-Structured Neural Networks"
url_source:
url_preprint:
journ: "ICRA 2026 — Autonomous Driving Workshop"
venue: "ICRA 2026 — Autonomous Driving Workshop"
year: 2026
doi: ""
poster_pdf: poster.pdf
article_pdf: paper.pdf
pub_number: 57
order: -57
image: poster.png
---

::: {.poster-preview}
![](poster.png){fig-alt="Poster: A Fully Differentiable Framework for Autonomous Driving Based on Model-Structured Neural Networks" width=95%}
:::
